title: thelypteris × wildemanii
intro: Thelypteris × wildemanii, also known as Wildeman's fern, is a hybrid fern species in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Thelypteris × wildemanii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
